title: Carrivar

{{Quote|They originally came from here, Carrivar, and migrated to Osseriton here, via Umaren'k.|Saba Sebatyne, on the Hemes Arbora|<ref name="FHII" />}}
'''Carrivar''' was an astronomical object<ref name="FHII" /> in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions']] [[Carrivar system/Legends|Carrivar system]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Hemes Arbora]] was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to Carrivar but eventually abandoned the celestial body. The Hemes Arbora migrated first to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Umaren'k]]<ref name="FHII" /> in the [[Umaren'k system/Legends|Umaren'k system]]<ref name="TEA" /> and later to the planet [[Osseriton/Legends|Osseriton]].<ref name="FHII" /> In [[80 BBY/Legends|80 BBY]], [[Succate]], a [[chronicler]] from Carrivar, assembled the largest collection of information on the [[Sorcerers of Rhand]], a group of beings who believed in the [[Philosopher/Legends|philosophical]] concept known as [[Way of the Dark|the Dark]].<ref name="TUR">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref>

By [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].</ref> the position of Carrivar was noted on a two-dimensional [[Star map/Legends|star map]] that was included in a [[Book/Legends|book]] kept at the [[Expeditionary Library]] on the planet [[Csilla]].<ref name="FHII" /> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="TERC" /> while searching the [[Library/Legends|library's]] records for information about [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], a sentient planet capable of traveling through [[Realspace/Legends|space]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saba Sebatyne]] perused the book and later showed the map featuring Carrivar to the [[Youngling/Legends|girl]] [[Wynssa Fel]] while telling her about the Hemes Arbora.<ref name="FHII" />

==Behind the scenes==
Carrivar was first mentioned in [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee|''Refugee'']], the second novel in the [[Force Heretic trilogy|''Force Heretic'' trilogy]] of the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series. The novel was written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] and published in [[2003]].<ref name="FHII" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Carrivar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Carrivar itself, in grid square G-9.<ref name="TEA" />
